info.name: Nominations
info.description:
Nominations API (dynamic forms, submissions, file uploads).

**Field layout**
Each `fields[]` item may include:
- `space_occupancy`: `"full"` (full width, default) or `"half"` (50% width)

**Display-only field types**
`section_title` and `section_note` are layout/display-only fields. They render as headings or informational notes on the public form. Rules:
- They are **never validated on submit** — do not include their keys in `responses`.
- `label` holds the heading text (for `section_title`) or an optional note title (for `section_note`).
- `help_text` holds the body copy for `section_note`.
- `required` is always forced to `false` on the server for these types.
- A unique slug `key` is still required (DB constraint), but it is purely internal.

request.description: Staff JWT for admin nomination routes. Use `access_token` from response as Bearer token.
Returns all available field type value/label pairs, including `section_title` and `section_note`.

Returns the full form with nested `fields[]`. Each field includes `space_occupancy`.

Fields with `field_type` of `section_title` or `section_note` are display-only — render them as headings/notes in the UI. Do **not** include their keys in the `responses` payload when submitting; the server skips them entirely during validation.
Multipart upload for a `file` field. Only valid for fields with `field_type: "file"`. Returns `{ file: { key, url, name, content_type, size } }` or `{ files: [...] }` for multiple.

Submit responses for an active form. `responses` must be a JSON object keyed by field `key`.

**Do not include keys for `section_title` or `section_note` fields** — these are display-only and are skipped by the server during validation. Including them is harmless but unnecessary.

item.name: Create Form (with section_title, section_note, and file field)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Annual Awards 2026",
  "description": "Nominate candidates for the annual awards.",
  "is_active": true,
  "fields": [
    {
      "key": "section_nominee_info",
      "label": "Nominee Information",
      "field_type": "section_title",
      "required": false,
      "order": 1,
      "space_occupancy": "full",
      "help_text": "",
      "max_text_length": null,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": false,
      "max_files": null,
      "max_file_size_mb": null
    },
    {
      "key": "nominee_name",
      "label": "Nominee Name",
      "field_type": "text",
      "required": true,
      "order": 2,
      "space_occupancy": "half",
      "help_text": "Full legal name, max 25 characters.",
      "max_text_length": 25,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": false,
      "max_files": null,
      "max_file_size_mb": null
    },
    {
      "key": "nominee_bio",
      "label": "Nominee Bio",
      "field_type": "textarea",
      "required": false,
      "order": 3,
      "space_occupancy": "half",
      "help_text": "Brief biography, max 500 characters.",
      "max_text_length": 500,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": false,
      "max_files": null,
      "max_file_size_mb": null
    },
    {
      "key": "supporting_documents",
      "label": "Supporting Documents",
      "field_type": "file",
      "required": false,
      "order": 4,
      "space_occupancy": "full",
      "help_text": "Upload images or PDFs. Max 3 files, 5 MB each.",
      "max_text_length": null,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": true,
      "max_files": 3,
      "max_file_size_mb": 5
    },
    {
      "key": "note_terms",
      "label": "Terms & Conditions",
      "field_type": "section_note",
      "required": false,
      "order": 5,
      "space_occupancy": "full",
      "help_text": "By submitting, you agree to our editorial terms and confirm that the information provided is accurate to the best of your knowledge.",
      "max_text_length": null,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": false,
      "max_files": null,
      "max_file_size_mb": null
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Creates a form with a full field set including:
- `section_title` — renders as a section heading; only `label` is displayed
- `section_note` — renders as an informational note; `label` is an optional title, `help_text` is the body copy
- Regular input fields (`text`, `textarea`, `file`)

`section_title` and `section_note` fields are skipped entirely during submit validation. `required` is forced to `false` by the server for these types regardless of what is sent.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Annual Awards 2026",
  "description": "Updated description.",
  "is_active": true,
  "fields": [
    {
      "key": "section_nominee_info",
      "label": "Nominee Information",
      "field_type": "section_title",
      "required": false,
      "order": 1,
      "space_occupancy": "full",
      "help_text": "",
      "max_text_length": null,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": false,
      "max_files": null,
      "max_file_size_mb": null
    },
    {
      "key": "nominee_name",
      "label": "Nominee Name",
      "field_type": "text",
      "required": true,
      "order": 2,
      "space_occupancy": "half",
      "help_text": "Now half width, max 30 chars.",
      "max_text_length": 30,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": false,
      "max_files": null,
      "max_file_size_mb": null
    },
    {
      "key": "supporting_documents",
      "label": "Supporting Documents",
      "field_type": "file",
      "required": false,
      "order": 3,
      "space_occupancy": "full",
      "help_text": "Full width row. Max 2 files, 3 MB each.",
      "max_text_length": null,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": true,
      "max_files": 2,
      "max_file_size_mb": 3
    },
    {
      "key": "note_terms",
      "label": "Terms & Conditions",
      "field_type": "section_note",
      "required": false,
      "order": 4,
      "space_occupancy": "full",
      "help_text": "By submitting, you agree to our editorial terms and confirm that the information provided is accurate to the best of your knowledge.",
      "max_text_length": null,
      "options": [],
      "allow_multiple_files": false,
      "max_files": null,
      "max_file_size_mb": null
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Sending `fields` replaces **all** existing field rows on the server (full replace, not merge). Always include the complete desired field list, including any `section_title` or `section_note` rows you want to keep.
Omitting `fields` updates only the top-level metadata (`name`, `description`, `is_active`). Existing field rows are untouched.
